calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Allison Pascal, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff John Stewart,
Witness, Khalilah Al'Qawwee, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants Anthony Franklin, Greta Builter and all other occupants.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing
2-Henry Hotel Lease Agreement
3-Notice to Pay Rent or Quit
4-Proof of Service
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 106 Sixth Street, Unit 709, City and County of San Francisco, California 94103

Damages $1643.00
Holdover damages $963.56
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $315.00
For a Total Judgment of $2921.56

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Adrian Colley; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Janet Thompson.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendants Anthony Franklin and Greta Butler ARE NOT PRESENT.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendants. The trial date of NOV21-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
